usage: add_obj_on_bump [-help] {{-cell <string> | -selected | -feedthru } {-relative_pin_layer <layer> | -rect {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -polygon {{x1 y1} {x2 y2}...}}} [-check_only <string> | -write_script <string>] {[-shape <layer>+ ] [-placement_blockage ] [-routing_blockage <layer>+] [-physical_pin <layer>+]} [{-shape <layer>+ } [-check_only <string>] [-incremental ] [-shape_keep_net ]] [-feedthru [-cdl_map_file <string>]]

options.name: -cdl_map_file
options.description: output cdl map file for LVS.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specify the bump cell name to add objects on it.

options.name: -check_only
options.description: check if there's shape on the specified bumps and output a report file.

options.name: -feedthru
options.description: Add objects on the bump, which contains TSV layer and whose net is feedthrough net.

options.name: -incremental
options.description: Add shapes in incremental modes. Delete the shapes where's no bump and add new shapes on the bumps where has no shape. Incremental only checks the shapes on the same layer. If first command "add_obj_on_bump -shape M1" and the second command "add_obj_on_bump -shape DRTSV -incremental", the layers are different, so that add_obj_on_bump will not delete previous added shape on M1. The results of second command "add_obj_on_bump -shape DRTSV -incremental" is same with command "add_obj_on_bump -shape DRTSV".

options.name: -physical_pin
options.description: Specify the layer to add physical pins. ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -polygon
options.description: Specify point list of polygon to add objects.The center of specified polygon bounding box align to the center of specified bump's cell center.

options.name: -rect
options.description: Specify rectangle to add objects.The center of specified rectangle align to the center of specified bump's cell center.

options.name: -relative_pin_layer
options.description: Specify the pin layer of pin shape of specified bump. add shape based on specified pin shape of bump. ((layer), optional)

options.name: -routing_blockage
options.description: Specify the layer to add routing blockages on bumps. ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -selected
options.description: Add objects on the selected bumps.

options.name: -shape
options.description: Specify the layer to add shapes. ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -shape_keep_net
options.description: Keep the net when adding the layer shape.

options.name: -write_script
options.description: specify file name to dump a tcl script for adding objects on bumps. With this commands, tool will not add objects on bumps directly.
